Pricing Features Sign In

Ship code with a team
of AI agents

Describe what you want to build. Cowork-Claw orchestrates Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Gemini and more to get it done — sandboxed, with PRs and full git history.

All plans include hosted sandbox execution and bring-your-own-key support.

Sign In with GitHub View Plans

Powered by

ClaudeCodexCopilotCursorGeminiOpenCodePi

Everything you need to ship faster

🤖

Multi-Agent Orchestration

Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Gemini, and more — coordinated to tackle your task.

🔀

GitHub Integration

Connect your repos, create branches, and manage code changes directly from the platform.

📦

Live Sandboxes

Each task runs in an isolated Docker sandbox with a full development environment.

🔄

Automated PRs

Agents push code, open pull requests, and respond to review comments automatically.

🔑

Bring Your Own Key

Use your own API keys for AI providers, or use ours — both included in every plan.

🌐

Browser-Based IDE

File editor, terminal, diff viewer, and LSP — all in your browser, no local setup.

🛡️

Secure by Default

Encrypted credentials, isolated sandboxes, and scoped API keys for every session.

Simple, transparent pricing

Every plan includes hosted sandbox execution and bring-your-own-key support. No hidden fees.

Hobby

For individual developers and side projects

$20/month
  • 20 tasks per day
  • 200 sandbox minutes/month
  • All AI agents
  • Bring your own key or use ours
  • Hosted sandbox execution
Get Started
Most Popular

Pro

For professional developers shipping daily

$75/month
  • 100 tasks per day
  • 1,500 sandbox minutes/month
  • All AI agents
  • Bring your own key or use ours
  • Hosted sandbox execution
  • Priority support
  • Orchestration mode
Get Pro

Business

For teams that build together (min. 3 users)

$40/user/month

Starts at $120/month for 3 users

  • 200 tasks per day per user
  • 3,000 sandbox minutes/month
  • All AI agents
  • Bring your own key or use ours
  • Hosted sandbox execution
  • Team workspaces
  • Priority support
  • Usage analytics
Get Business
